docs.text: Welcome to MkDocs For full documentation visit mkdocs.org . Commands mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project. mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server. mkdocs build - Build the documentation site. mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit. Project layout mkdocs.yml # The configuration file. docs/ index.md # The documentation homepage. ... # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.text: Customization of booked schedular HKU portal sign on How to allow non-HKU members to sign on? Enable check-in with staff/student card Automatic update of schedules Automatic update of blackout timeslots How to find blackout instances that need to be updated? How to have one resource with different schedules One resource with two different classes of users: ordinary and advanced users. Ordinary users can only book the resource Mon to Fri 10:00 to 16:00. Advanced users can additionally book the resource Mon to Fri 18:00 to 23:00 and Sat/Sun 09:00 to 23:00
docs.title: Customization

docs.text: One resource with two different classes of users: ordinary and advanced users. Ordinary users can only book the resource Mon to Fri 10:00 to 16:00. Advanced users can additionally book the resource Mon to Fri 18:00 to 23:00 and Sat/Sun 09:00 to 23:00
docs.title: How to have one resource with different schedules

docs.text:
Installation Download booked scheduler v2.8.5 from Twinkle Toes Software - Supports php7, mysql8. Does not work with php8. Open source version from Github . As of 2023-08-01, the latest version is 2.8.6 which supports PHP8 Installation on school web server Note this is note Tip this is alo There is ok this is ok I have no idea of what to dod require_once('config/config.php'); #echo 'Please update the $conf[\'settings\'][\'script.url\'] setting in your config file to be http://' . $_SERVER['SERVER_NAME'] . str_replace('/index.php', '', $_SERVER['PHP_SELF']) . '/Web'; #echo '
You will be redirected automatically in 20 seconds, but portions of Booked Scheduler will not function correctly.'; header( "refresh:0;url=Web?" . urlencode($_SERVER['QUERY_STRING']) ); exit;
docs.title: Installation

docs.text: Notes on timetabling Convert .docx file from Denny to Excel: How? Which script? Delete any 'carriage returns' in the titles/topics in the .docx file Paste into Excel Unmerged cells, so one line one entry Add last column with course code Example of the text file for processing by python script: Ref Date Day Time Venue Topic Lecturer Code L1 2023-09-04 Mon 1330-1420 TBC Cartilage and bone connective tissue Yang-J BMSN3605 L2 2023-09-04 Mon 1430-1520 TBC Skull, vertebral column and back muscles Yang-J BMSN3605 L3 2023-09-05 Tue 1330-1420 TBC Appendicular skeleton Cheung-L BMSN3605 L4 2023-09-05 Tue 1430-1520 TBC Appendicular muscles Cheung-L BMSN3605 L5 2023-09-07 Thu 1030-1120 TBC Limb plexus Cheung-L BMSN3605 L6 2023-09-07 Thu 1130-1220 TBC Muscles of the head & face Cecot-TS BMSN3605 R1 2023-09-11 Mon 1330-1420 TBC Review session (Anatomy) Cheung-L BMSN3605 R2 2023-09-11 Mon 1430-1520 TBC Review session (Anatomy) Yang-J BMSN3605 L7 2023-09-12 Tue 1330-1420 TBC Synaptic & neuromuscular transmission Ma-CW BMSN3605 L8 2023-09-12 Tue 1430-1520 TBC Excitation & muscle contraction Ma-CW BMSN3605 P1 A 2023-09-14 Thu 1030-1220 DL Limbs, vertebral column, head & neck demonstration (Group A) Cheung-A BMSN3605 Yang-J BMSN3605 Fonseca-G BMSN3605 Lee-JCD BMSN3605 L9 2023-09-18 Mon 1330-1420 TBC Reflex physiology Ma-CW BMSN3605 P1 A 2023-09-18 Mon 1430-1620 DL Limbs, vertebral column, head & neck demonstration (Group B) Cheung-A BMSN3605 Cheung-L BMSN3605 Cecot-TS BMSN3605 Liu-R BMSN3605
docs.title: Notes

Delete any 'carriage returns' in the titles/topics in the .docx file Paste into Excel Unmerged cells, so one line one entry Add last column with course code Example of the text file for processing by python script: Ref Date Day Time Venue Topic Lecturer Code L1 2023-09-04 Mon 1330-1420 TBC Cartilage and bone connective tissue Yang-J BMSN3605 L2 2023-09-04 Mon 1430-1520 TBC Skull, vertebral column and back muscles Yang-J BMSN3605 L3 2023-09-05 Tue 1330-1420 TBC Appendicular skeleton Cheung-L BMSN3605 L4 2023-09-05 Tue 1430-1520 TBC Appendicular muscles Cheung-L BMSN3605 L5 2023-09-07 Thu 1030-1120 TBC Limb plexus Cheung-L BMSN3605 L6 2023-09-07 Thu 1130-1220 TBC Muscles of the head & face Cecot-TS BMSN3605 R1 2023-09-11 Mon 1330-1420 TBC Review session (Anatomy) Cheung-L BMSN3605 R2 2023-09-11 Mon 1430-1520 TBC Review session (Anatomy) Yang-J BMSN3605 L7 2023-09-12 Tue 1330-1420 TBC Synaptic & neuromuscular transmission Ma-CW BMSN3605 L8 2023-09-12 Tue 1430-1520 TBC Excitation & muscle contraction Ma-CW BMSN3605 P1 A 2023-09-14 Thu 1030-1220 DL Limbs, vertebral column, head & neck demonstration (Group A) Cheung-A BMSN3605 Yang-J BMSN3605 Fonseca-G BMSN3605 Lee-JCD BMSN3605 L9 2023-09-18 Mon 1330-1420 TBC Reflex physiology Ma-CW BMSN3605 P1 A 2023-09-18 Mon 1430-1620 DL Limbs, vertebral column, head & neck demonstration (Group B) Cheung-A BMSN3605 Cheung-L BMSN3605 Cecot-TS BMSN3605 Liu-R BMSN3605

docs.title: Scripts

docs.text: sbms_conf.py - config file for other scripts. Need to edit the timetable entry, date etc print-timetable-all-for-import-2023-timetable.py
docs.title: Scripts

docs.text: Excel Extract weekday from date =TEXT(DATE(2023,8,31),"ddd") -> Thu =TEXT(A2,"ddd") -> Thu (A2 the excel cell with a date entry) Calculate difference between two time, roudup to nearest integer =24*(TIME(12,12,12)-TIME(10,9,12)) -> 2.05 =ROUNDUP(24*(A1-A2),0) Import data from MySQL = Source{[Schema="sbms",Item="A_teaching_2019"]}[Data] = MySQL.Database("www.sbms.hku.hk", "sbms", [ReturnSingleDatabase=true, Query="select * from A_teaching_2019_draft where staff = 'wong bcw';"]) check whether cell contains partial text match to another cell =IF(COUNTIF(range,criteria),[value_if_true],[value_if_false]) =IF(COUNTIF(M2,"*"&K2&"*"),"clash","")
docs.title: Excel

docs.text: =TEXT(DATE(2023,8,31),"ddd") -> Thu =TEXT(A2,"ddd") -> Thu (A2 the excel cell with a date entry)
docs.title: Extract weekday from date
Calculate difference between two time, roudup to nearest integer

docs.text: = Source{[Schema="sbms",Item="A_teaching_2019"]}[Data] = MySQL.Database("www.sbms.hku.hk", "sbms", [ReturnSingleDatabase=true, Query="select * from A_teaching_2019_draft where staff = 'wong bcw';"])
docs.title: Import data from MySQL

docs.text: =IF(COUNTIF(range,criteria),[value_if_true],[value_if_false]) =IF(COUNTIF(M2,"*"&K2&"*"),"clash","")
docs.title: check whether cell contains partial text match to another cell

docs.text: School Web Require HKU portal login for admin page (www.sbms.hku.hk/admin) edit /html/theorigo/application/views/admin/cms_user/login.php Problem Cannot see images in the admin page Answer Need to install ImageMagik: How to add additional sections e.g. blog? CREATE TABLE new_table LIKE original_table; create folders: /home/sbms/www.sbms.hku.hk/html/theorigo/application/modules/blog /home/sbms/www.sbms.hku.hk/html/theorigo/application/modules/blog/controllers /home/sbms/www.sbms.hku.hk/html/theorigo/application/modules/blog/controllers/admin /home/sbms/www.sbms.hku.hk/html/theorigo/application/modules/blog/entity /home/sbms/www.sbms.hku.hk/html/theorigo/application/modules/blog/views cp modules/news/controllers/News.php modules/blog/controllers/News.php cp modules/news/controllers/Event.php modules/blog/controllers/Blog.php Edit cp modules/news/controllers/admin/Event.php modules/blog/controllers/admin/Blog.php Edit cp modules/news/entity/event.php modules/blog/entity/blog.php Edit cp modules/news/entity/event.yaml modules/blog/entity/blog.yaml Edit cp modules/news/views/news_detail.twig modules/blog/views/news_detail.twig cp modules/news/views/news_index.twig modules/blog/views/news_index.twig /home/sbms/www.sbms.hku.hk/html/theorigo/application/modules/news/controllers/Blog.php /home/sbms/www.sbms.hku.hk/html/theorigo/application/modules/news/controllers/admin/Blog.php /home/sbms/www.sbms.hku.hk/html/theorigo/application/modules/news/entity/blog.php /home/sbms/www.sbms.hku.hk/html/theorigo/application/modules/news/entityblog.yaml edit: /home/sbms/www.sbms.hku.hk/html/theorigo/application/config/routes.php $route['(blog)(/.*)?'] = "news/$1/router$2"; e.g. blog/ok: $1 = blog; $2 = ok html/theorigo/application/modules/news/controllers/Blog.php add: $route['admin/(blog)(/. )?'] = 'blog/admin/$1$2'; $route['(blog)(/. )?'] = "blog/$1/router$2"; Means: How to add additional highlighted items? Original: 4 highlighted items in 1 row: New: 5 highlighted items in 1 row Answer Edit structure of mysql table: frontpage_data: Add columns hl_image_5 and hl_title_5: ALTER TABLE frontpage_data ADD hl_image_5 varchar(255) NULL AFTER hl_title_4, ADD hl_title_5 varchar(255) NULL AFTER hl_image_5; Result: Edit html/theorigo/application/modules/main/controllers/Main.php Under public function filter_frontpage($item){ * change: for($i=1; $i<=4; $i++){ $this->to_href_target($item['hl_link_'.$i], 'link'); $this->to_src_alt_2x($item, $oid, 'hl_image_'.$i, 'hl_title_'.$i, $size['hl']); } * to: for($i=1; $i<=5; $i++){ $this->to_href_target($item['hl_link_'.$i], 'link'); $this->to_src_alt_2x($item, $oid, 'hl_image_'.$i, 'hl_title_'.$i, $size['hl']); } Edit html/theorigo/application/modules/main/entity/frontpage.php Add the following after section_hl_4 'section_hl_5' => array ( 'caption' => 'Highlight Box 5', 'type' => 'section', ), 'hl_image_5' => array ( 'caption' => 'Image', 'type' => 'file', 'resize' => '363c229', 'require' => true, 'dimension' => array ( 0 => 726, 1 => 458, ), ), 'hl_title_5' => array ( 'caption' => 'Title', 'type' => 'text', 'hidden' => false, 'require' => true, ), 'hl_link_5' => array ( 'caption' => 'Link', 'type' => 'group', 'multiple' => true, 'children' => array ( 'title' => array ( 'caption' => 'Title', 'type' => 'text', 'require' => true, ), 'link' => array ( 'caption' => 'Link', 'type' => 'link', 'entity' => '{"page":"Page", "staff":"Staff", "news":"News", "event":"Event"}', ), ), ), Edit html/theorigo/application/modules/main/entity/frontpage.yaml Add the following after section_hl_4 section_hl_5: caption: Highlight Box 4 type: section hl_image_5: caption: Image type: file resize: "363c229" require: true dimension: [ 726, 458 ] hl_title_5: caption: Title type: text hidden: false require: true hl_link_5: caption: Link type: group multiple: true children: title: caption: Title type: text require: true link: caption: Link type: link entity: '{"page":"Page", "staff":"Staff", "news":"News", "event":"Event"}' Result: Highlight box 5 created: Edit html/theorigo/application/modules/main/views/index.twig. Change: {% for j in range(1, 4) %} <div class="card__item card-main__item" tabindex="0"> <figure class="card__item-fig card-main__item-fig"> To: {% for j in range(1, 5) %} <div class="card__item card-main__item" tabindex="0"> <figure class="card__item-fig card-main__item-fig"> Edit html/writables/min/css/projectbase.css @media screen and (max-width: 767px) .card-main__item { width: 100%; margin: 0 0 25px; } @media (max-width: 991px) .card-main__item { width: calc((100% - 60px)/3); /* change from /2 to /3 */ margin: 5px; /* change from 15px to 5px */ } @media (max-width: 1599px) .card-main__item { width: calc((100% - 63px)/5); /* change from /4 to /5 */ margin-right: 15px; /* change from 21px to 15px */ } .card-main__item { position: relative; z-index: 1001; width: calc((100% - 90px)/5); /* change from /4 to /5 */ margin: 0 15px 0 0; /* change from 30px to 15px */ } How to reduce the font size for text within the highlighted items? Alternative: arrange highlights in two rows: How to enter the newsletter item using form interface? How to put Cheah under Emeritus Professor? What are the differences between staff category vs staff type? How to add SBMS broucher to the About Us tab?
